compiled_state.title: GREEN: Create dso:completion-verifier dedicated agent with consumer smoke test
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Create plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md — a dedicated plugin agent that independently verifies success criteria and done definitions before closure.

**Agent behavior:**
- For epics: reads each success criterion from the epic description, checks whether the implementation delivers the described outcome
- For stories: reads each done definition, checks whether the implementation delivers the described outcome
- Returns pass/fail per criterion with evidence (what was found or not found)
- On failure: creates remediation tasks as bug tickets under the parent epic with correct priority for sprint-next-batch.sh pickup

**Scope boundaries (explicitly stated in agent):**
- IN: behavioral changes exist, consumers function, criteria not skipped/partially addressed
- OUT: test pass/fail (test gate), code quality (code review), lint/formatting (hooks)
- Framing: 'did we build what the spec says?' not 'is the code correct?'

**Consumer smoke test (infrastructure epics):**
- When epic modifies shared infrastructure (ticket system, hooks, merge workflow, sprint tooling), enumerate known consumers via codebase grep/glob discovery (not hardcoded)
- Define specific verification commands per consumer (e.g., ticket CLI for ticket system, hook test for hooks)
- Verification commands must pass before closure is approved

**Remediation task creation:**
- Tasks created via .claude/scripts/dso ticket create with type bug, priority from parent epic, parent set to epic ID
- Must integrate with sprint Phase 8 remediation flow

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md — Create

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Agent file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] Agent contains consumer smoke test instructions
  Verify: grep -q 'consumer.*smoke\|enumerate.*consumer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] Agent contains scope exclusions
  Verify: grep -q 'out of scope\|OUT.*test pass.*code quality\|explicitly out of scope' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] Agent contains remediation task creation
  Verify: grep -q 'remediation\|ticket create.*bug' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] All agent tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_completion_verifier_agent.py --tb=short -q

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Agent definition committed and pushed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
